headline: Jefferies Lowers Northrop Grumman (NOC) Price Forecast despite Steady Revenue Growth Outlook
summary: Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 26, Jefferies lowered its price recommendation on Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE:NOC) to $580 from $620. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. In its second-quarter preview, the firm estimated that Northrop Grumman’s revenue would grow […]
